CVE-2021-45926.title: MDB Tools (aka mdbtools) 0.9.2 has a stack-based buffer overflow  ...
CVE-2021-45926.summary: MDB Tools (aka mdbtools) 0.9.2 has a stack-based buffer overflow (at 0x7ffd0c689be0) in mdb_numeric_to_string (called from mdb_xfer_bound_data and _mdb_attempt_bind).
